codeSystems.name: AccessionNumberType
codeSystems.title: Accession Number Type
codeSystems.description: Identifier types that may be associated with an accession number in an Australian context.

codeSystems.name: AMTMedicinalProductAndSubstances
codeSystems.title: AMT Medicinal Product and Substances
codeSystems.description: The AMT Medicinal Product and Substances value set includes values that may be used to identify a substance or a medicinal product that is an ingredient of a medication.

codeSystems.name: CoverageTypeandSelfPayCodesAUExtended
codeSystems.title: Coverage Type and Self-Pay Codes - AU Extended
codeSystems.description: Coverage type codes extended for use in an Australian context. Includes HL7 international codes plus Australian additions to create a complete set.

codeSystems.name: AUTimeZone
codeSystems.title: AU Time Zone
codeSystems.description: Australian time zones.

codeSystems.name: ContactPurpose
codeSystems.title: Contact Purpose
codeSystems.description: The purpose for which an associated contact can be reached.

codeSystems.name: DVAEntitlement
codeSystems.title: DVA Entitlement
codeSystems.description: Entitlement types that may be associated with an individual's Department of Veterans’ Affairs (DVA) File Number on a DVA issued health card in an Australian context.

codeSystems.name: JurisdictionValueSetAUExtended
codeSystems.title: Jurisdiction ValueSet - AU Extended
codeSystems.description: Jurisdiction ValueSet extended for use in an Australian context. Includes HL7 international codes plus Australian additions to create a complete set.

codeSystems.name: LocationPhysicalTypeAUExtended
codeSystems.title: Location Type (Physical) - AU Extended
codeSystems.description: Location type (physical) extended for use in an Australian context. Includes HL7 international codes plus Australian additions to create a complete set.

codeSystems.name: MedicationType
codeSystems.title: Medication Type
codeSystems.description: The Medication Type value set may be used to classify the nature of properties defined by the code e.g. branded product with no strength or form. This allows the distinction between codes provided containing container, pack, strength and form explicitly especially where terminologies supplied are unknown or terminology services are unavailable.

codeSystems.name: MedicineItemChange
codeSystems.title: Medicine Item Change
codeSystems.description: The Medicine Item Change value set includes values that may be used to identify that a change that has been made, or is recommended to be made, to a medicine item.

codeSystems.name: MIMS
codeSystems.title: MIMS
codeSystems.description: The MIMS value set includes all values from the Monthly Index of Medical Specialties (MIMS) published by MIMS Australia. Further details can be found at https://www.mims.com.au/.

codeSystems.name: NameContext
codeSystems.title: Name Context
codeSystems.description: The Name Context value set may be used to classify suitable uses or purposes of names.

codeSystems.name: OrderIdentifierType
codeSystems.title: Order Identifier Type
codeSystems.description: Identifier types that may be associated with an order identifier in an Australian context.

codeSystems.name: PBSItemCodes
codeSystems.title: PBS Item Codes
codeSystems.description: The PBS Item Codes value set includes all values from Australian Pharmaceutical Benefits Scheme (PBS) schedule published by the Department of Health. Further details can be found at https://www.pbs.gov.au/pbs/.

codeSystems.name: AURecordedSexOrGenderSource
codeSystems.title: AU Recorded Sex or Gender (RSG) Source
codeSystems.description: The AU Recorded Sex or Gender (RSG) Source value set includes codes that can be used to represent the non-document source where the sex or gender value is recorded.

codeSystems.name: AURecordedSexOrGenderSourceDocumentType
codeSystems.title: AU Recorded Sex or Gender (RSG) Source Document Type
codeSystems.description: The AU Recorded Sex or Gender (RSG) Source Document Type value set includes codes that can be used to represent the type of document where this sex or gender value is recorded.

codeSystems.name: AURecordedSexOrGenderType
codeSystems.title: AU Recorded Sex or Gender Type
codeSystems.description: The AU Recorded Sex or Gender Type value set includes codes that can be used to represent the type or category of sex or gender that is recorded.

codeSystems.name: ServiceProvisionConditionsAustralianConcepts
codeSystems.title: Service Provision Conditions Australian Concepts
codeSystems.description: The Service Provision Conditions Australian Concepts value set includes values that may be used to identify the type of service provision conditions in an Australian context.

codeSystems.name: Hl7VSIdentifierTypeAUExtended
codeSystems.title: hl7VS-identifierType - AU Extended
codeSystems.description: Extended value set of identifier types for use in an Australian context. Includes HL7 international codes plus Australian additions to create a complete set. NOTE: codes contained LACN Laboratory Accession ID and ACN Accession ID are exclusive concepts and not consider related in this terminology.

codeSystems.name: Hl7VSDegreeLicenseCertificateAUExtended
codeSystems.title: hl7VS-degreeLicenseCertificate - AU Extended
codeSystems.description: hl7VS-degreeLicenseCertificate extended for use in an Australian context. Includes HL7 international codes plus Australian additions to create a complete set.

codeSystems.name: Hl7VSProviderRoleAUExtended
codeSystems.title: hl7VS-providerRole - AU Extended
codeSystems.description: hl7VS-providerRole extended for use in an Australian context. Includes HL7 international codes plus Australian additions to create a complete set.

codeSystems.name: ActEncounterCodeAUExtended
codeSystems.title: ActEncounterCode - AU Extended
codeSystems.description: v3 Act Encounter Code extended for use in an Australian context. Includes HL7 international codes plus Australian additions to create a complete set.

codeSystems.name: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleTypeAUExtended
codeSystems.title: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType - AU Extended
codeSystems.description: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType extended for use in an Australian context. Includes HL7 international codes plus Australian additions to create a complete set.
